creator: laurent.chardon@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #6)

The classic method "make install" in the ports tree works fine in a fresh install of 15.0-CURRENT with various configs that I tried. It's possible that the problem is with your particular installation. 

# After make depends build stage
$ make install
===>  Installing for openmpi-5.0.3
===>  Checking if openmpi is already installed
===>  Switching to root credentials for 'install' target
===>   Registering installation for openmpi-5.0.3
Installing openmpi-5.0.3...
===>  Returning to user credentials
[13:20:02] [laurent@freebsd-current:~/work/ports/net/openmpi]
$
